dict.string: Sherpa Profiling Sample uses the local network to expose its MAUI DevFlow inspector agent to development tools on this Mac.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query Bluetooth permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query calendar permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query camera permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query contacts permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query location permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query microphone permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query photo library permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
Sherpa Profiling Sample may query reminders permission status for DevFlow platform inspection.
